parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5', max_tokens: 800, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Generate Week ' + $('Weekly Stats').first().json.stats.week_number + ' performance report for Akinwunmi's 90-Day War Plan.

Stats: ' + JSON.stringify($('Weekly Stats').first().json.stats) + '
Revenue Phase: ' + $('Weekly Stats').first().json.stats.revenue_phase + ' (target: $' + $('Weekly Stats').first().json.stats.weekly_target + '/wk)
Revenue this week: $' + $('Weekly Stats').first().json.stats.revenue_earned + ' (' + ($('Weekly Stats').first().json.stats.weekly_target > 0 ? Math.round(($('Weekly Stats').first().json.stats.revenue_earned / $('Weekly Stats').first().json.stats.weekly_target) * 100) : 0) + '% of target)

Rules:
- Headline: average score + revenue vs target
- Break down each discipline
- Identify strongest + weakest
- Name patterns
- Revenue analysis: on track / behind / ahead
- 2-3 actionable directives for next week
- Include one business quote on compounding/consistency
- 400-600 words. Slack Block Kit formatting.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Generate this week's report.' }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: 'WF09', channel: 'slack', day_num: $('Day Counter').first().json.day_number, message: $('OpenRouter Weekly Report').first().json.choices[0].message.content }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: 'WF09', channel: 'slack', day_num: $('Day Counter').first().json.day_number, message: $('Fallback').first().json.choices[0].message.content }) }}
